잠언 22:1.content: A good name is more desirable than great riches, and loving favor is better than silver and gold.

잠언 22:2.content: The rich and the poor have this in common: Yahweh is the maker of them all.

잠언 22:3.content: A prudent man sees danger and hides himself; but the simple pass on, and suffer for it.

잠언 22:4.content: The result of humility and the fear of Yahweh is wealth, honor, and life.

잠언 22:5.content: Thorns and snares are in the path of the wicked: whoever guards his soul stays from them.

잠언 22:6.content: Train up a child in the way he should go, and when he is old he will not depart from it.

잠언 22:7.content: The rich rule over the poor. The borrower is servant to the lender.

잠언 22:8.content: He who sows wickedness reaps trouble, and the rod of his fury will be destroyed.

잠언 22:9.content: He who has a generous eye will be blessed; for he shares his food with the poor.

잠언 22:10.content: Drive out the mocker, and strife will go out; yes, quarrels and insults will stop.

잠언 22:11.content: He who loves purity of heart and speaks gracefully is the king’s friend.

잠언 22:12.content: Yahweh’s eyes watch over knowledge; but he frustrates the words of the unfaithful.

잠언 22:13.content: The sluggard says, “There is a lion outside! I will be killed in the streets!”

잠언 22:14.content: The mouth of an adulteress is a deep pit. He who is under Yahweh’s wrath will fall into it.

잠언 22:15.content: Folly is bound up in the heart of a child: the rod of discipline drives it far from him.

잠언 22:16.content: Whoever oppresses the poor for his own increase and whoever gives to the rich, both come to poverty.

잠언 22:17.content: Turn your ear, and listen to the words of the wise. Apply your heart to my teaching.

잠언 22:18.content: For it is a pleasant thing if you keep them within you, if all of them are ready on your lips.

잠언 22:19.content: I teach you today, even you, So that your trust may be in Yahweh.

잠언 22:20.content: Haven’t I written to you thirty excellent things of counsel and knowledge,

잠언 22:21.content: To teach you truth, reliable words, to give sound answers to the ones who sent you?

잠언 22:22.content: Don’t exploit the poor, because he is poor; and don’t crush the needy in court;

잠언 22:23.content: for Yahweh will plead their case, and plunder the life of those who plunder them.

잠언 22:24.content: Don’t befriend a hot-tempered man, and don’t associate with one who harbors anger:

잠언 22:25.content: lest you learn his ways, and ensnare your soul.

잠언 22:26.content: Don’t you be one of those who strike hands, of those who are collateral for debts.

잠언 22:27.content: If you don’t have means to pay, why should he take away your bed from under you?

잠언 22:28.content: Don’t move the ancient boundary stone which your fathers have set up.

잠언 22:29.content: Do you see a man skilled in his work? He will serve kings. He won’t serve obscure men.
